apiKey.label: Kapso API Key
apiKey.help: Kapso project API key — sent in the X-API-Key header for Cloud API REST send (NOT Authorization: Bearer).

appSecret.label: Meta App Secret
appSecret.help: Meta app secret — used ONLY as the x-hub-signature-256 HMAC key for inbound webhook validation.

phoneNumberId.label: WABA Phone-Number ID
phoneNumberId.help: Cloud API sender phone-number-id ({phoneNumberId}/messages). Optional — derived from the WABA id when absent.

businessAccountId.label: WhatsApp Business Account ID
businessAccountId.help: WABA id — enables phone-number-id lookup when phoneNumberId is not set.

portfolioId.label: Meta Business Portfolio ID
portfolioId.help: Context only — identifies the owning Meta Business Portfolio.

configId.label: Kapso WhatsApp Config ID
configId.help: Context only — identifies the Kapso connection for Kapso-native ops.

inbound.label: Inbound Policy
inbound.help: pairing (default, deny-by-default → connect CTA), allowlist, or disabled.

allowFrom.label: Inbound Allowlist
allowFrom.help: E.164 numbers (+…) accepted when inbound: allowlist.
